india_trends.title: Uber leases over 9 lakh sq ft Hyderabad office through 10-year lease for GCC
india_trends.summary: Uber India Systems has secured a massive office space in Hyderabad. The company will occupy over 9 lakh square feet for a decade. This deal is valued at nearly Rs 839 crore. It highlights Uber's growing commitment to India. Hyderabad continues to attract global companies for technology and operation

india_trends.title: FDH Aero opens Bengaluru office to strengthen India aerospace supply chain play
india_trends.summary: US-based FDH Aero has opened a new office in Bengaluru, consolidating its hardware and electronics divisions to support India's growing aerospace and defence sector. This full-service hub, backed by local inventory and teams, aims to cater to tier-1 manufacturers and OEMs amidst strong commercial ae

india_trends.title: Kaynes Technology Q4FY26 profit declines 21.5% to ₹91.2 cr amid rising costs, shares down by 20%
india_trends.summary: The shares of the company was hammered by 20 per cent on BSE and ended the day at ₹3,339.25

india_trends.title: Jio Financial block deal: Goldman Sachs sells over 26.75 lakh shares worth Rs 62 crore
india_trends.summary: Jio Financial Services saw a ₹62 crore block deal as Goldman Sachs sold 26.75 lakh shares to Morgan Stanley. The stock gained 1.12% despite weak one-year performance and a 14% YoY profit decline in Q4FY26, even as revenue and AUM posted strong growth during the quarter.

india_trends.title: CISF takes over security of Bihar's Darbhanga airport
india_trends.summary: The Central Industrial Security Force has formally taken charge of security at Darbhanga airport in Bihar. A contingent of 145 personnel has been deployed. This marks the third civil aviation facility in Bihar under CISF security. The deployment is strategically important due to Darbhanga's proximit

india_trends.summary: A report by CNI InfoXchange highlights that sustained FII inflows, rising SIP participation, and structural reforms have strengthened market resilience

india_trends.title: Govt to explore possibility of PLI scheme for seafood MSMEs
india_trends.summary: India's seafood sector is set for a major boost. The government plans a production-linked incentive scheme for small and medium seafood businesses. This aims to enhance global competitiveness and increase exports. The focus will be on value-added products and expanding the number of exporters signif

india_trends.title: S&P upgrades Vedanta Resources rating on stronger finances, demerger
india_trends.summary: The rating upgrade reflects the company's strengthening financial operations, improving cost structures, proactive refinancing and continued deleveraging, following the group's demerger, S&P Global Ratings said in a statement.

india_trends.title: Government tightens rules for duty-free gold imports, caps quantity at 100 kg per licence
india_trends.summary: The Directorate General of Foreign Trade has introduced new rules for duty-free gold imports by gems and jewellery exporters. These measures include a 100 kg limit per licence and mandatory facility inspections for new applicants. Existing exporters must meet 50 percent of previous export obligation

india_trends.title: Shadowfax Q4 Results: Co reports Rs 56 crore profit, revenue up 74%
india_trends.summary: Revenue for the quarter under review grew nearly 73.73 per cent year-on-year (YoY) to Rs 1,237 crore from Rs 712 crore a year ago, Shadowfax said in a regulatory filing.

india_trends.title: Rs 1,435 crore Adani Enterprises block deal sees GQG sell stake to India's largest mutual fund
india_trends.summary: Marquee investor GQG Partners offloaded nearly 58.9 lakh shares of Adani Enterprises for approximately Rs 1,435 crore in a significant block deal. SBI Mutual Fund acquired the entire stake at Rs 2,435.6 per share. This transaction occurred as Adani Enterprises' stock experienced a sharp rally, climb

india_trends.title: United Spirits Q4 Results: Profit jumps 27% on demand for premium liquor
india_trends.summary: Karnataka, one of India's highest-tax ​alcohol markets, said ​in March it ⁠will scrap government price controls and shift to strength-based excise taxation from April 2026, allowing companies to set prices while ​cutting tax slabs.

india_trends.title: Bagmane Prime Office REIT ends 3.7% higher at ₹103.66
india_trends.summary: IPO received strong bids from investors

india_trends.title: P N Gadgil Jewellers Q4 Results: Net profit jumps 45% to ₹90 crore, revenue rises 123%; margins contract sharply
india_trends.summary: P N Gadgil Jewellers saw strong growth in revenue and profit for the March quarter, with consolidated revenue up 123.2% YoY to ₹354.4 crore. However, margins contracted sharply. The company expanded its retail presence to 78 stores, aiming for pan-India leadership.

india_trends.title: US stocks today: US stocks open higher as Nvidia gains; US-China talks, data in focus
india_trends.summary: Wall ​Street ​stock indexes opened higher ​on Thursday as Nvidia's shares ‌jumped, ⁠while investors assessed ⁠economic ​data and watched developments ​around the high-stakes U.S.-China summit.
